What This Is

Three days. One farm. A working AI playbook in hand by Sunday.

You can now sit down with AI and say: "Ask me 20 questions about my business, then give me a week-by-week plan for me and my team." That has never existed before.

The operators who learn to actually use it are going to pull ahead fast. This summit makes sure you're one of them.
